basic_details.job_title: ESIC Hospital Kollam Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 14 Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC Hospital Kollam)
basic_details.post_name: Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents
basic_details.short_information: The Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC Hospital Kollam) has officially announced the Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The detailed notification was published on 06 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 69 years for Super Specialists/Specialists and up to 45 years for Senior Residents, and hold MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma/DNB or MCh/DM/DNB in the concerned speciality, can attend the walk-in interview on 15 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Super Specialist/Specialist: Max 69 years. Senior Resident: Max 45 years (relaxation for reserved candidates).
age_limit.details: Super Specialist/Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Senior Resident: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation for reserved candidates will be as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with TCMC/MCI registration, PG Degree/Diploma/DNB in concerned speciality, MCh/DM/DNB for Super Specialists.
qualification.details: Super Specialist: Recognized medical qualification included in the first or second schedule or part-II of the third Schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. MCh/DM/DNB or equivalent in the concerned Super Speciality. Specialist: MBBS degree with TCMC registration and Post Graduate Degree/DNB, or Diploma in concerned speciality. For ICU, PG degree or PG Diploma holders in Anaesthesia/General Medicine/ Pulmonology/Critical care and registered with Medical Council. Three years' experience in respective speciality for degree holders or Five years' experience in respective speciality for diploma holders. Senior Resident: MBBS degree with TCMC registration and PG Degree/Diploma holders in concerned speciality with registration in Kerala State Medical Council.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 2,00,000/- (Full Time Super Specialist), Rs. 1,00,000/- (Part Time Super Specialist), Rs. 1,40,817/- (Full Time Specialist), Rs. 60,000/- (Part Time Specialist), Approx. Rs. 1,40,817/- (Senior Resident)
salary_details.details: Super Specialist (Full Time): Rs. 2,00,000/- per month Super Specialist (Part Time): Rs. 1,00,000/- per month. Additional Rs.20,000/- admissible as visiting charges in case of emergency (if willing). Rs.1200/- for additional every hour, beyond 16 hrs subject to the justification of competent authority. Specialist (Full Time): Rs. 1,40,817/- per month (approximate amount) Specialist (Part Time): Rs. 60,000/- per month. Additional Rs. 15,000/- admissible as visiting charges in case of emergency (if willing). Rs.800/- for additional every hour, beyond 16 hrs subject to the justification of competent authority. Senior Resident: Approximately Rs.1,40,817/- (for PG Degree holders). Rs.1350/- is deducted if the SR is a diploma holder.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Hospital Kollam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Hospital Kollam Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 15 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time for registration and the interview.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in the ESIC Hospital Kollam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment drive is for Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents. Specific specializations are available within these categories, as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for Senior Resident posts is an MBBS degree with TCMC registration and a PG Degree/Diploma in the concerned speciality, along with registration in the Kerala State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Super Specialists and Specialists?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Super Specialists and Specialists is 69 years. There is no minimum age limit specified for these positions.

faq.question: Q5. How is the selection process conducted for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications, experience, and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the ESIC Hospital Kollam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-, SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 50/-, and female candidates/PWD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for a Full-Time Specialist?
faq.answer: A Full-Time Specialist can expect a salary of approximately Rs. 1,40,817/- per month. Part-time specialists receive Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ESIC Hospital Kollam located?
faq.answer: ESIC Hospital Kollam is located in Ezhukone, Kollam, Kerala, with the pincode 691505.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any relaxations in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation for reserved candidates is applicable for the Senior Resident posts as per government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates bring to the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Hospital Kollam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Hospital Kollam Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 15 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time for registration and the interview.
